tasks.description: A list of tasks that the runner will execute. Each task is defined with specific commands and configurations.

variables.description: [Not Implemented Yet] A list of variable tasks that can override default settings or provide new ones.

name.description: The name of the task, recommended for identification.

command.description: Path to the executable file, script, or executable name to run.

args.description: Array of command arguments. Built-in variables can be used, such as ${staged}, ${git-files}, ${last-commit}

output.description: [Not Implemented Yet] Specifies the output log level. Can be 'always', 'verbose', or 'never'.

cwd.description: Current working directory for the command.

group.description: Group of the task, usually the hook name.

branch.description: [Not Implemented Yet] Regex to run the task on specific branches only.

include.description: [Not Implemented Yet] Glob pattern to select files.

exclude.description: [Not Implemented Yet] Glob pattern to exclude files.

filteringRule.description: [Not Implmenetd Yet] The filtering rule for this task. Can be 'variable' or 'staged'.

name.description: The name of the variable task.

args.description: Arguments for the variable task command. Built-in variables can be used, such as ${staged}, ${git-files}, ${last-commit}

cwd.description: Current working directory for the variable command.

staged.description: When true, files returned by this variable are treated as staged files, enabling re-staging after formatting (same behavior as the built-in ${staged} variable).

outputTypes.description: [Not Implmeneted Yet] Specifies the output log level.

filteringRules.description: [Not Implemented Yet] The filtering rule for this task. Can be 'variable' or 'staged'.
